name: Fund for the Promotion of Young Researchers
description: Funding for organisation of an Agent-based-modelling workshop “Winterschool: Building Agent-Based Modelling Capacities for Sustainability Research”. Awarded in December 2025, sum: 3865 CHF

name: COMET Career Programme
description: Funding for female researchers in successfully pursuing their academic careers: individually customised programme to enhance skills, know-how and motivation. Awarded in 2024, sum: 3500 CHF

name: Fund for participation compensation
description: Funding for PhD candidates to recompensate participants of experiments. Awarded in 2022, sum: 2080 CHF

name: Promotion of Sustainable Development through Education (FNE)
description: Funding for conception, implementation, and evaluation of a proseminar on psychology and sustainability. Awarded in 2021, sum: 12PP, approx. 17160 CHF

name: Hilfsassistenszunterstützung für NachwuchswissenschaftlerInnen
description: Funding for Support of junior researchers to hire a research assistant. Awarded in 2018, sum: approx. 9 PP, approx. 12510 CHF

name: Doctoral students workshop
description: Fund for organising a workshop on Bayesian multi-level models with Dr. Paul Bürkner. Awarded in 2017, sum: 4550 CHF
